items.title: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Procter & Gamble, Lowers Price Target to $174
items.description: B of A Securities  analyst Olivia Tong   maintains Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $180 to $174.

items.title: Here's What to Expect From Procter & Gamble's Next Earnings Report
items.description: Procter & Gamble is scheduled to release its fiscal first-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts project a single-digit earnings drop.

items.title: UBS Maintains Buy on Procter & Gamble, Lowers Price Target to $176
items.description: UBS  analyst Peter Grom   maintains Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $180 to $176.

items.title: Updated Preliminary Agenda: 5th Palm Beach CorpGov Forum Nov 5-6
items.description: CorpGov, IPO Edge and PE Edge will host the fifth annual Palm Beach CorpGov Forum on Wednesday, Nov. 5 and Thursday, Nov, 6, 2025, at the Palm Beach Lake Pavilion, located waterfront with sweeping views of Palm Beach Island. The Forum will feature panels and firesides from 1pm to 5pm. Networking receptions will follow at The Cove […] The post Updated Preliminary Agenda: 5th Palm Beach CorpGov Forum Nov 5-6 appeared first on CorpGov.
